programs.title: The Movie Show
programs.desc: In this episode, Margaret Pomeranz talks to Tian Zhuang Zhuang about Horse Thief, its violence and film themes. David Stratton interviews Tait Brady and Paul Byrnes on film festivals and featured films.

programs.title: The Amazing Mr. Blunden
programs.desc: Complex, Dickensian ghost story about two young children who move with their mother to an old mansion. The genial resident ghost introduces them to two ghost children, who ask them to solve an ancient mystery. This requires them to travel back in time to save two orphans from a dreadful uncle and a terrible death in a burning house.

programs.title: The Three Musketeers Part I: D'Artagnan
programs.desc: Constance Bonacieux is kidnapped before D'Artagnan's very eyes. In a frantic quest to save her, the young musketeer, aided by Athos, Porthos and Aramis, is forced to join forces with the mysterious Milady de Winter.

programs.title: Fame
programs.desc: Young men and women audition for coveted spots at the New York High School of Performing Arts. Those who make the cut discover that it takes a lot of hard work to become a star and sometimes difficult decisions have to be made. The youngsters grapple with heavy issues such as homosexuality, abortion, attempted suicide and illiteracy. On top of their unique struggles, the students must deal with the mundane pressures of adolescence like homework, heartbreak and rejection.

programs.title: Discovering Film
programs.desc: From Alien and The Elephant Man to Harry Potter, this is a look at the life and hugely successful career of the British actor.

programs.title: Lassie: A New Adventure
programs.desc: Lassie is on a rescue mission with her best friend Flo. This time round, Lassie's detective skills are particularly called upon to get to the bottom of the mysterious disappearances of several pedigree dogs.
